item.title: this week will be something
item.description: we've been so nervous of moving even slightly away from Lucien's Synthwave roots but Country means so much to me personally and we finally were able to choose 8 tracks that balance both worlds. Wish us luck. These couple of weeks have been insane

item.title: Saturday WHOLESOME Dump To Improve Your Mood #319
item.description:
1. That is one chill cat
2. Insert happy feelings
3. Doggo about to fly
4. Why have you forsaken me, Mother?!
5. The Most Nonchalant Ace Combat Pilot
6. Big Ears Does This When She Wants To Be Picked Up
7. Horse mimics owner who is making Snow Angels
8. God Forbid Girls Have Some Fun
9. Wholesome Packaging
10.
11. Awww
12. Have You Had The Brosnan Latte Yet? I hear it's good
13. Jack Black Should Play A SuperHero Dad?
14. A Good Way To Wake Up
15. Hey you, have a good day ;) P.S. For the past 20 months, I’ve been working on my own game, and while it’s starting to get a bit of attention, it just makes me doubt myself even more. A lot of people have played the demo, and I can feel the pressure because, come release day, it’s all or nothing. Some days it feels great, and other days, I’m completely burnt out. I just hope I can give people a similar experience to the ones I had growing up, playing games and having a blast. If you’d like to support my efforts, a simple wishlist would mean the world to me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/ P.S.+ Have an awesome Weekend!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: When Allyson Felix became pregnant,N¡ke was prepared to cut the terms of Felix's endorsement by as much as 70% due to the pregnancy, and told her to “know your place and just run.” Amid all of this, she was forced to have an emergency c-section
item.description: When Allyson Felix became pregnant, N¡ke was prepared to cut the terms of Felix's endorsement by as much as 70% due to the pregnancy, and told her to “know your place and just run.” ? Amid all of this, she was forced to have an emergency c-section seven months into her pregnancy because of a potentially life-threatening condition and her baby had to live for more than a month in the NICU. But two years later she’s qualified for her fifth Olympics with her daughter watching. Felix dropped N¡ke and created her own brand of running shoes, the Saysh One. She used running in the Olympics in Japan wearing them under the banner “I Know My Place”. With 11 medals now, she passed Carl Lewis this summer for the most track and field medals by an American in history! "I used my voice and built this company for you. So that you never have to train at 4:30am while you're 5 months pregnant to hide your pregnancy from your sponsor.”
item.dc:creator: Joyika

Hi, hello, howdy, high
.
Hmmm.
.
And I love them.
Daily.
.
What?
No.
.
.
.
.
No....maybe. No.
.
.
.
Heh.
.
Humor me?
Cooper Tax! Have a great weekend!

oh no
monch monch monch
El Goonish Shive, Multiple times throughout the comic.
it is urgent.
I should watch emperor's new groove
Behold. a flaming fuck
yeah
C Y B E R P U N K
Trump: Fucks with the people who prevent plane crashes Also Trump: "I bet DEI did this!"
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Remember this
When Trump dies, throw street parties.
YOU KNOW WHAT THEY DID
sussy balls
PUT THIS GOTH TWINK IN A MAID OUTFIT POST HASTE
I think both were surprised to see each other
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: You don't understand. It really is a coup.
item.description:
Full article, I've excerpted the biggest parts: https://www.theatlantic.com/ideas/archive/2025/01/trump-administration-strategy/681497/?gift=y15x651LNkpCq35iaSXbvoxF8-FPo_HRQMEItwFDVk8&utm_source=copy-link&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=share
This isn't Trump. This is Project 2025. He's just their stupid ugly figurehead absorbing blame for them, for the things that even come to light. They are doing so much worse in the background. This is a coup.
item.dc:creator: dreammer243

item.title: Which one of you painted this?

item.title: I'll fuckin do it again
item.dc:creator: rhuala

item.title: Goddamn, girl. Luigi would be proud.
item.description: Context, via familysoupmutualaid on IG: The City of Reno has implemented measures that ticket, fine, and jail people experiencing homelessness for sitting or lying down in public spaces. This has been after years of activists, advocates and organizers have been attempting to persuade the city to reopen the doors of a formerly established shelter that had previously been abandoned and left in disrepair. The city has blatantly ignored the steadily increasing number of people who are forced to live outside while offering sweetheart real estate deals to out of state developers who have priced out most poor and working class people in this city. This comment was one of many. 300 people wrote in to city council in opposition of this ordinance, and there were 2.5 hours of in person comments in opposition. 10 comments were in favor of the criminalization of poverty, all by gentrifying downtown business owners. Edit with sauce, thanks to @psuedon : https://youtu.be/grYhozCT-yo?&t=1980 comment starts at the 33 minute mark.
item.dc:creator: AllAnusMorissette

item.title: Well... At least I did *something*...
item.description: Went protesting today, Omas gegen Rechts (Grannies against Rightwing) had organized it against the AfD, but given the last few days, it also became one against the CDU, too. 20k-25k people came. Can't say I enjoyed it, can't say that I believe that it will have any noticeable effect, but, well, at least I added 1 to the number of people there.

item.title: Leopards feasting so much.
item.description:
1. Somehow, there are so many clueless or ignorant.
2. Who will they hire now?
3. Seriously ignorant. Or a fox news watcher.
4. Prices already rising.
5. Didn't think dei might include women according to conservatives, huh?
6. Fafo
7. I hope maga vets get what they deserve. Sympathy for the other vets.
8. Getting what they deserve?
9. Looks like famine.
10. Amazing how much trump resembles the fuhrer.
11. Ok, maybe a bit too dark.
12. Sigh. It's only been a week. I can't imagine four years of this.

item.title: Another plane crash in a major East Coast City. A plane just hit a Philadelphia mall 30-60 minutes ago. Roosevelt Mall. Hit cars and buildings. Multiple injuries.

Aftermath on the streets
